name: Sikka
compose:
name: slashnode-sikka
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/sikkalabs/sikka:0.2.0
    container_name: sikka
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - web_data:/home/sikka/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:64552:64552
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-sikka_web_data
